---
title: "Software"
---

## klue

An R package implementing the clustering-initialised specification workflow for latent class multinomial logit (LCMNL) models from the [companion paper](research.qmd): clustering-based initialisation, multi-start maximum likelihood, and segment selection via BIC with a classification-entropy diagnostic, benchmarked against mixed logit.

[GitHub](https://github.com/o-frings/klue) · [R-universe](https://o-frings.r-universe.dev/klue)

```r
install.packages("klue", repos = "https://o-frings.r-universe.dev")
```

## Net climate value pipeline

The reproducible R pipeline behind *The Net Climate Value of Carbon Credits*: calibration of leakage, storage-duration, and reversal-risk deductions for sixteen forest management practices across three European biomes, with Monte Carlo uncertainty.

[GitHub](https://github.com/o-frings/net-climate-value)
